title: PrxjX's Xp Optimizer
description: PrxjX's Xp Optimizer lets you automatically throw Experience Bottles by simply holding down your use button instead of repeatedly clicking.
body: PrxjX's Xp Optimizer is a lightweight client-side Minecraft 1.21.11 Fabric mod that lets you automatically throw Experience Bottles by simply holding down your use button instead of repeatedly clicking. The mod includes a fully customizable CPS (clicks per second) slider, allowing you to adjust how fast XP bottles are thrown anywhere from 1 CPS to 100 CPS, with a default speed of 8 CPS. PrxjX's Xp Optimizeris designed to make enchanting, repairing gear with Mending, and XP farming much faster and more convenient while staying smooth and easy to use through an in-game config menu.
